modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help creating a hyperlink in my Word document

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to make a hyperlink to a specific place in my Word document, but I don’t know how to do it. I want to link to a location, but I can’t find the right steps. It’s really confusing for me, and I just need some simple help with this.
short_description: Need help creating a hyperlink in my Word document
description: I’m trying to make a hyperlink to a specific place in my Word document, but I don’t know how to do it. I want to link to a location, but I can’t find the right steps. It’s really confusing for me, and I just need some simple help with this.
